{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":47},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616032934718423832","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，少有的纳米核心的书，目前为止没啥问题"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773248917,"group_id":"7583684501016955929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"介绍一下你自己，说你呢！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5W+EDT6eYyuo9PXn81uD1k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/56ac70b4056c489dbe5ef7e3f6931caf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622611&x-signature=V5WRCriFSac4kDZwOHkhpTEwRMY%3D","user_id":"413892729900595","user_name":"冰之恶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"413892729900595","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748879860,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":18,"name":"2024年度报告","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ccdc75f1db2f2539675b6d6e4b8bc26e","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ccdc75f1db2f2539675b6d6e4b8bc26e"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583684501016955929","book_info":{"abstract":"当虫洞的光芒吞没元星，第五代亚人战士米赛亚·密米尔，坠入了夜之城冰冷的钢铁丛林。这里没有他熟悉的基因困境，只有植入体寒光、公司霸权与街头永不停歇的生死游戏。
作为身负“奥丁”纳米装甲与电敏感天赋的异乡来客，米尔选择了一条截然不同的路。刻下自己的名字。一次源自“亚人十诫”的救援，让他与梦想成为传奇的曼恩小队、坚韧的黑客少女萨沙·雅科夫列娃，以及豪爽的准传奇杰克·威尔斯产生了命运的交织。他不仅救下了他们的生命，更以一种不依赖赛博改造的纯粹力量，撼动了这座城市的固有规则。
然而，夜之城不会忽视任何异数。公司的觊觎、中间人的算计、传奇佣兵亚当·重锤的铁拳相继袭来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1203d4153bd7d234ca364105793f243f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不会翻身的咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7583684501016955929","book_name":"赛博朋克：纳米核心","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5748人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586095100250292798","read_count":"5748","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"493556"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"239","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,星际,穿越,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1203d4153bd7d234ca364105793f243f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288628&x-signature=f6wnVfTDctv9lh%2BC4uHtXOCHujg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1389392151717613","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration": 01016955929","book_info":{"abstract":"当虫洞的光芒吞没元星，第五代亚人战士米赛亚·密米尔，坠入了夜之城冰冷的钢铁丛林。这里没有他熟悉的基因困境，只有植入体寒光、公司霸权与街头永不停歇的生死游戏。
作为身负“奥丁”纳米装甲与电敏感天赋的异乡来客，米尔选择了一条截然不同的路。刻下自己的名字。一次源自“亚人十诫”的救援，让他与梦想成为传奇的曼恩小队、坚韧的黑客少女萨沙·雅科夫列娃，以及豪爽的准传奇杰克·威尔斯产生了命运的交织。他不仅救下了他们的生命，更以一种不依赖赛博改造的纯粹力量，撼动了这座城市的固有规则。

然而，夜之城不会忽视任何异数。公司的觊觎、中间人的算计、传奇佣兵亚当·重锤的铁拳相继袭来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1203d4153bd7d234ca364105793f243f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不会翻身的咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7583684501016955929","book_name":"赛博朋克：纳米核心","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5748人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586095100250292798","read_count":"5748","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"493556"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"239","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,星际,穿越,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1203d4153bd7d234ca364105793f243f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288628&x-signature=f6wnVfTDctv9lh%2BC4uHtXOCHujg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1389392151717613","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"164"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration
